translations.en: a rather plump woman with darting eyes.
translations.zh: 一位頗為豐腴、眼神靈動的女子。

translations.en: "Hello. How are you this $T?"
"Hello again. Are you well $T?"
"What is it you need?"
"Marta."
"It is a plain name, but I must live with it."
translations.zh: 「是個平凡的名字，但我也只能接受了。」

translations.en: "Oh dear, my husband runs the inn. I tend my @garden."
translations.zh: 「哦，我的丈夫打理旅店，我則照料我的@花園。」

translations.en: "You've not seen it? I have the loveliest @roses."
translations.zh: 「你未曾見過？我種了最美麗的@玫瑰。」

translations.en: "Red as the evening sun on the sea."
"He's a messy person - and smelly too."
"My dear little one? She is an angel - well minded, kind, thoughtful."
translations.zh: 「我親愛的小妮子？她如天使般——聰慧、善良、體貼。」

translations.en: "She's a dear."
"Nasty creatures, or so I hear. Can stomp a garden to pieces in minutes."
translations.zh: 「據說是可怕的惡獸，幾分鐘便能將花園踩得一塌糊塗。」

translations.en: "My husband talks a bit too much, but I love him."
"I want to move from this house as soon as we can."
"I cut myself one time in the garden. She healed it."
translations.zh: 「有一次我在花園裡割傷了自己，她替我治好了。」

translations.en: "Another strange man. We have so many here."
translations.zh: 「又一個怪人。這裡怪人可真不少。」

translations.en: "He never comes into town."
"It was the scariest thing I ever saw! I'm sure it's still lurking about somewhere..."
translations.zh: 「那是我這輩子見過最驚人的事！我確信它仍在某處徘徊……」

translations.en: "Goodbye."
"You will have to ask another that."

translator_notes: 085 Marta: 吉迪恩之妻，溫和家庭婦女，對幽靈事件心有餘悸。
